{{Infobox character
| name = Jyrid
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jyrid]] is also known as [[Clockworker]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jyrid]] is a reliable old human man.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jyrid]] is described as someone who only cares about protecting people down to his core.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Jyrid?” she asked the old man whom most called Clockworker.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
